Pelan Strategik Badget Text PELAN STRATEGIK PENDIGITALAN SEKTOR AWAM NEGERI SABAH 2021-2025 Terbitan edisi kedua ini merangkumi pelan-pelan strategik edisi pertama yang telah dikemaskini dan diberi nama baru iaitu “PELAN STRATEGIK PENDIGITALAN SEKTOR AWAM NEGERI SABAH”. Pelan strategik ini digubal bertujuan untuk menerangkan hala tuju perancangan, pembangunan, pelaksanaan dan penggunaan ICT bagi tempoh 5 tahun bermula 2021 hingga 2025. Klik Sini Badget Text Pelan Strategik JPKN 2021-2025 Jabatan Perkhidmatan Komputer Negeri (JPKN) berperanan memberikan perkhidmatan dan pembangunan ICT yang merangkumi Perancangan dan Konsultasi ICT, Pembangunan Sistem-Sistem Aplikasi, Perkhidmatan Sokongan Rangkaian ICT, Perkhidmatan Multimedia, Perkhidmatan Pusat Data dan Pengurusan Keselamatan Siber untuk semua Agensi Kerajaan Negeri Sabah (AKNS). Klik Sini Jabatan Perkhidmatan Komputer Negeri Jabatan Perkhidmatan Komputer Negeri Tingkat 6 & 7, Blok A Menara Kinabalu Jalan UMS,Teluk Likas 88400 Kota

semua Agensi Kerajaan Negeri Sabah (AKNS). Klik Sini Jabatan Perkhidmatan Komputer Negeri Jabatan Perkhidmatan Komputer Negeri Tingkat 6 & 7, Blok A Menara Kinabalu Jalan UMS,Teluk Likas 88400 Kota Kinabalu SABAH No Tel/faks: +6088 – 368900+6088 – 215 116+6088 – 368 833 (Helpdesk) email: jpkn@sabah.gov.my Pautan Webmail Sabah Gov Sistem i-Adu (Unit Integriti Negeri Sabah) Kelab Sukan dan Rekreasi Komputer (KESITAR) PAKSi Sabah E-Circular WAKTU PEJABAT Hari Bekerja: Isnin – JumaatMasa Bekerja: 7:30 am – 17:00 pmWaktu Rehat: 13:00 – 14:00Cuti: Sabtu , Ahad, dan Cuti Umum. Sijil Dan Pengikhtirafan “SABAH MAJU JAYA” JABATAN PERKHIDMATAN KOMPUTER NEGERI // Import Firebase Modules import { initializeApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/11.4.0/firebase-app.js"; import { getFirestore, doc, getDoc, setDoc, runTransaction, serverTimestamp, onSnapshot } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/11.4.0/firebase-firestore.js"; // Firebase configuration const firebaseConfig = { apiKey:

doc, getDoc, setDoc, runTransaction, serverTimestamp, onSnapshot } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/11.4.0/firebase-firestore.js"; // Firebase configuration const firebaseConfig = { apiKey: "AIzaSyAqpGN30mhbzGfy7oaNcpb0WNcWjgUUHhc", authDomain: "jpkn-website-visitors.firebaseapp.com", projectId: "jpkn-website-visitors", storageBucket: "jpkn-website-visitors.appspot.com", messagingSenderId: "765896329853", appId: "1:765896329853:web:5188de7834186d13d37f14" }; // Initialize Firebase const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig); const db = getFirestore(app); // Function to calculate current date in MYT (Malaysia Time) function getMalaysiaDateString() { const now = new Date(); const malaysiaTime = new Date(now.getTime() + (8 * 60 * 60 * 1000)); return malaysiaTime.toISOString().split("T")[0]; } // Function to reset visitor stats /* async function resetAllVisitorStats() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "visitors"); const resetData = { todayVisitors: 0, totalVisitors: 0, totalHits: 0,

} // Function to reset visitor stats /* async function resetAllVisitorStats() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "visitors"); const resetData = { todayVisitors: 0, totalVisitors: 0, totalHits: 0, lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0] }; try { await setDoc(docRef, resetData); console.log("Visitor stats reset successfully."); } catch (error) { console.error("Error resetting visitor stats:", error); } } */ // Function to update visitor stats async function updateVisitorStats() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "visitors"); try { await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => { const docSnap = await transaction.get(docRef); let data = docSnap.exists() ? docSnap.data() : { todayVisitors: 0, totalVisitors: 0, totalHits: 0, lastUpdated: getMalaysiaDateString() }; const today = getMalaysiaDateString(); // Reset daily counter if date has changed if (data.lastUpdated !== today) { data.todayVisitors = 0; data.lastUpdated = today; } // Count today's uniue visitor (once per day per

// Reset daily counter if date has changed if (data.lastUpdated !== today) { data.todayVisitors = 0; data.lastUpdated = today; } // Count today's uniue visitor (once per day per browser) const visitedToday = localStorage.getItem("visitedToday"); if (visitedToday !== today) { data.todayVisitors++; localStorage.setItem("visitedToday", today); } // Check if the user is a unique visitor (across multiple days) const uniqueVisitorKey = `uniqueVisitor-${today}`; if (!localStorage.getItem(uniqueVisitorKey)) { data.totalVisitors++; localStorage.setItem(uniqueVisitorKey, "true"); } data.totalHits++; // Update Firestore transaction.set(docRef, data); }); } catch (error) { console.error("Error updating visitor stats:", error); } } // Function to format the date and time function formatDateTime(date) { let day = date.getDate().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let month = (date.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0'); let year = date.getFullYear(); let hours = date.getHours().toString().padStart(2,

let day = date.getDate().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let month = (date.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0'); let year = date.getFullYear(); let hours = date.getHours().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let minutes = date.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let seconds = date.getSeconds().toString().padStart(2, '0'); return `${day}/${month}/${year} ${hours}:${minutes}:${seconds}`; } // Function to update last updated time in Firestore async function updateLastUpdatedTime() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"); const newTime = new Date(); try { await setDoc(docRef, { timestamp: serverTimestamp() }, { merge: true }); document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent = formatDateTime(newTime); } catch (error) { console.error("Error updating last updated time:", error); } } // Function to fetch the last updated time from Firestore async function fetchLastUpdatedTime() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"); try { const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef);

} } // Function to fetch the last updated time from Firestore async function fetchLastUpdatedTime() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"); try { const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef); if (docSnap.exists()) { const data = docSnap.data(); if (data.timestamp) { document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent = formatDateTime(data.timestamp.toDate()); } } } catch (error) { console.error("Error fetching last updated time:", error); } } // Real-time listener for visitor stats onSnapshot(doc(db, "stats", "visitors"), (docSnap) => { if (docSnap.exists()) { let data = docSnap.data(); document.getElementById("today-visitors").textContent = data.todayVisitors; document.getElementById("total-visitors").textContent = data.totalVisitors; document.getElementById("total-hits").textContent = data.totalHits; } }); // Real-time listener for last updated time onSnapshot(doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"), (docSnap) => { if (docSnap.exists()) { const data = docSnap.data(); if

= data.totalHits; } }); // Real-time listener for last updated time onSnapshot(doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"), (docSnap) => { if (docSnap.exists()) { const data = docSnap.data(); if (data.timestamp) { document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent = formatDateTime(data.timestamp.toDate()); } } }); // Run functions on page load document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => { // resetAllVisitorStats(); // Only use this when user want to reset the Pelawat Hari Ini/Jumlah Pelawat/Jumlah Capaian updateVisitorStats(); fetchLastUpdatedTime(); updateLastUpdatedTime(); }); Pelawat Hari Ini: 27 Jumlah Pelawat: 7694 Jumlah Capaian: 16670 Last updated: 15/07/2025 10:49:52 Dasar Privasi | Notis Penafian
